sections.subtitle: Current Form
sections.text: Sint-Truidense VV are in excellent form, winning 4 of their last 5 matches, including a dominant 4-0 away victory. SV Zulte Waregem have shown inconsistency with 2 wins and 3 losses in their last 5 matches, struggling defensively by conceding first in 4 of those games.

sections.subtitle: Head-to-Head Record
sections.text: In their last two encounters, Sint-Truidense VV have the upper hand with a 2-0 win in the most recent match, while SV Zulte Waregem won 2-0 in the earlier fixture. Historically, matches between these teams tend to be low-scoring, with under 2.5 goals in 4 of the last 5 head-to-heads.

sections.subtitle: Season Statistics
sections.text: Sint-Truidense VV, sitting 3rd in the league with 48 points, boast a strong attack (37 goals scored) and a solid defense (26 conceded). SV Zulte Waregem, in 12th with 29 points, have struggled defensively, conceding 35 goals this season, and their away form remains a concern.

sections.subtitle: Key Players to Watch
sections.text: For Sint-Truidense VV, Keisuke Goto has been in top form, scoring 3 goals and providing 2 assists in the last 5 matches. SV Zulte Waregem will rely on Jeppe Erenbjerg, their top scorer with 8 goals this season, to challenge the hosts' defense.

sections.subtitle: Match Outlook
sections.text: Given Sint-Truidense VV's superior form, league position, and home advantage at Stayen, they are favored to win, aligning with Sofascore's 44% probability for a home victory. SV Zulte Waregem's defensive vulnerabilities could be exploited by the hosts' potent attack.

halftimeSections.subtitle: First half overview
halftimeSections.text: The first half of the match between Sint-Truidense VV and SV Zulte Waregem ended in an entertaining 2-2 draw. Both teams showcased their attacking intent early on, with goals coming at crucial moments. Sint-Truidense VV managed to capitalize on their chances with a well-taken goal and a penalty just before the break. On the other hand, SV Zulte Waregem responded strongly with a brace from one of their key players, keeping the game level at half-time.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Team performance and statistics
halftimeSections.text: Sint-Truidense VV dominated possession and showed more composure in the final third, creating several big chances. Their ability to enter the penalty area frequently suggests they have the upper hand in breaking down defenses. However, SV Zulte Waregem demonstrated resilience, winning more duels and aerial battles, which allowed them to stay competitive. Despite being a man down after a red card, they managed to hold their own and pose a threat on the counter.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Key player contributions
halftimeSections.text: For Sint-Truidense VV, players like Simen Juklerød and Goto Keisuke were pivotal in their attacking plays, with both finding the back of the net. Their influence in the final third has been crucial. On the other side, SV Zulte Waregem's Joseph Opoku has been the standout performer, netting twice and proving to be a constant menace to the opposition's defense. His presence will be key in the second half despite the numerical disadvantage.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Attack momentum analysis
halftimeSections.text: The first half saw fluctuating momentum between the two sides. Initially, SV Zulte Waregem started with strong attacking spells, pushing forward with intent. However, Sint-Truidense VV gradually took control with sustained pressure during the middle of the half, creating dangerous moments in the opposition's box. Towards the end, momentum shifted back and forth, with both teams having significant attacking phases, particularly Sint-Truidense VV in the closing minutes.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Second half outlook
halftimeSections.text: Looking ahead to the second half, Sint-Truidense VV are likely to exploit their numerical advantage and push for a winning goal. Their superior possession and ability to create chances could see them edge ahead if they maintain their composure. SV Zulte Waregem, despite being a man down, will rely on counter-attacks and the clinical finishing of their key forward to snatch a result. Defensive organization will be paramount for them to avoid conceding.
